name: financial-monitoring-platform
description: A personalized stock market dashboard that enables users to follow stocks, build a watchlist, and receive smart in-app alerts.

scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d
scripts.prisma:generate: npx dotenv-cli -e backend/.env -- npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend
scripts.prisma:migrate: npx dotenv-cli -e backend/.env -- npm run prisma:migrate --prefix backend
scripts.prisma:studio: npx dotenv-cli -e backend/.env -- npm run prisma:studio --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm run db:up && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate
scripts.dev: npm run db:up && npm run prisma:generate && concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend:dev"
scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
